sentences.arabic: حَمَّلَتْ سَمِيرَةُ تَطْبِيقًا جَدِيدًا عَلَى هَاتِفِهَا.
sentences.translation: Samira je preuzela novu aplikaciju na telefon.
sentences.translationEn: Samira downloaded a new app on her phone.

sentences.translation: Aplikacija je bila za učenje arapskog jezika.
sentences.translationEn: The app was for learning the Arabic language.

sentences.translation: Otvorila ga je i počela prvu lekciju.
sentences.translationEn: She opened it and started the first lesson.

sentences.arabic: أَعْجَبَهَا التَّطْبِيقُ وَقَرَّرَتْ تَعَلُّمَ عَشَرَةِ كَلِمَاتٍ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Aplikacija joj se svidjela i odlučila učiti deset riječi dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: She liked the app and decided to learn ten words every day.
